text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whew... The skincare section's radiating with
feminine energy...

text_block_list.name: Cosmetics Shop Employee
text_block_list.text:
How are you today? Are you interested in this
glitter gel to make your skin sparkle? It's our
number one best seller!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, I see... That's great. Um... Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...That was scary. I can't believe I ran off like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should just get it online... Wait, then I
can't test it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Maybe I should just avoid being sparkly all together...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With glittery obstacles in her way, Nice Nature's
journey to healthy skin continues.
